programs.title: All Light, Everywhere
programs.desc: Filmmaker Theo Anthony offers a far-ranging look at the biases in how people see things, focusing on the recorded image.

programs.title: Sullivan's Crossing
programs.desc: When neurosurgeon Maggie Sullivan's seemingly perfect life in Boston is turned upside down, she leaves the city and her boyfriend, Andrew, to return to her childhood home of Sullivan's Crossing in Nova Scotia.

programs.title: Aurora Teagarden Mysteries
programs.desc: Aurora's boyfriend, Martin, reconnects with his long-lost niece, but she departs suddenly, leaving a dead husband on a balcony and a baby in a bathtub.

programs.title: Never Say Never Again
programs.desc: An aging James Bond (Sean Connery) makes an uncharacteristic mistake during a routine training mission, leading M (Edward Fox) to believe that the legendary British Intelligence spy is now past his prime. M indefinitely suspends Bond from active duty. However, when SPECTRE member Fatima Bush (Barbara Carrera) and her fellow terrorists successfully steal two nuclear missiles from the U.S. military, M must reinstate Bond, as he is the only agent who can beat SPECTRE at their own game of espionage.

programs.title: Billion Dollar Bluff
programs.desc: An influencer grips the media's attention by helping criminals rob luxurious mansions.

programs.title: Transplant
programs.desc: Dr. Bishop puts extra pressure on Bash, while Theo feels powerless when something happens to one of his daughters back home; a patient puts Mags' moral convictions to the test and June tries to improve her social skills.
